glosses.vi: tính cách; nhân vật công chúng

translations.it: Mi piace molto la sua personalità.
translations.ko: 그 사람의 성격이 정말 마음에 들어요.
translations.he: אני מאוד אוהב את האישיות שלו.
translations.vi: Tôi rất thích tính cách của anh ấy.
translations.nl: Ik hou erg van zijn persoonlijkheid.
translations.hi: मुझे उसकी शख्सियत बहुत पसंद है.
translations.pl: Bardzo podoba mi się jego osobowość.
translations.el: Μου αρέσει πολύ η προσωπικότητά του.
translations.nb: Jeg liker personligheten hans veldig godt.
translations.ro: Îmi place foarte mult personalitatea lui.
translations.cs: Jeho osobnost se mi opravdu líbí.
translations.da: Jeg kan virkelig godt lide hans personlighed.
translations.ja: 彼の性格がとても好きです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner agreeing in gender/number (feminine singular) with the noun it modifies.
Common noun (feminine singular); head of the subject noun phrase.
Clitic object pronoun (1st person singular), indirect object required by the verb plaire (plaire à qqn).
Main verb, present tense 3rd person singular; agrees with the subject “Sa personnalité”.
Adverb of degree modifying the verb “plaît”.

sentences.target: On parle de ta personnalité au boulot.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ paʁl də ta pɛʁ.sɔ.na.li.te o bu.lo/

translations.fr: On parle de ta personnalité au boulot.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ paʁl də ta pɛʁ.sɔ.na.li.te o bu.lo/
translations.en: We talk about your personality at work.
translations.es: En el trabajo hablamos de tu personalidad.
translations.de: Bei der Arbeit sprechen wir über deine Persönlichkeit.
translations.it: Al lavoro parliamo della tua personalità.
translations.zh-Hans: 在公司我们谈论你的性格。
translations.yue: 喺公司我哋會講你嘅性格。
translations.ru: На работе мы говорим о твоём характере.
translations.pt: No trabalho falamos sobre a sua personalidade.
translations.he: בעבודה אנחנו מדברים על האישיות שלך.
translations.vi: Ở chỗ làm, chúng tôi nói về tính cách của bạn.
translations.nl: Op het werk praten we over jouw persoonlijkheid.
translations.uk: На роботі ми говоримо про твій характер.
translations.hi: ऑफिस में हम तुम्हारी शख्सियत के बारे में बात करते हैं.
translations.pl: W pracy rozmawiamy o twoim charakterze.
translations.el: Στη δουλειά μιλάμε για την προσωπικότητά σου.
translations.nb: På jobben snakker vi om personligheten din.
translations.sv: På jobbet pratar vi om din personlighet.
translations.ro: La serviciu vorbim despre personalitatea ta.
translations.cs: V práci mluvíme o tvém charakteru.
translations.da: På arbejdet taler vi om din personlighed.
translations.ja: 職場であなたの性格について話します。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun meaning generic ‘one/people/we’ in context.
Main verb, present tense 3rd person singular.
Preposition introducing the complement “ta personnalité”.
Possessive determiner (2nd person singular), feminine singular, modifying “personnalité”.
Common noun (feminine singular); object of the preposition “de”.
Contraction of the preposition and article (à + le); introduces a locative complement.
Common noun (masculine, informal); object of “au”, meaning workplace/work.

sentences.target: Il a une personnalité très ouverte.

translations.fr: Il a une personnalité très ouverte.
translations.en: He has a very open personality.
translations.de: Er hat eine sehr offene Persönlichkeit.
translations.pt: Ele tem uma personalidade muito aberta.
translations.tr: Onun çok açık bir kişiliği var.
translations.vi: Anh ấy có tính cách rất cởi mở.
translations.nl: Hij heeft een heel open persoonlijkheid.
translations.nb: Han har en veldig åpen personlighet.
translations.id: Dia punya kepribadian yang sangat terbuka.
translations.sv: Han har en väldigt öppen personlighet.
translations.da: Han har en meget åben personlighed.
translations.ja: 彼はとてもオープンな性格です。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun (3rd person singular).
Main verb, present tense 3rd person singular, expressing possession.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, determiner of “personnalité”.
Common noun (feminine singular); direct object of “a”.
Adverb of degree intensifying the adjective “ouverte”.
Adjective, feminine singular, agreeing with “personnalité”.

sentences.target: Ta personnalité change selon les situations.

translations.fr: Ta personnalité change selon les situations.
translations.en: Your personality changes depending on the situation.
translations.es: Tu personalidad cambia según la situación.
translations.de: Deine Persönlichkeit verändert sich je nach Situation.
translations.it: La tua personalità cambia a seconda della situazione.
translations.zh-Hans: 你的性格会根据情况而变化。
translations.yue: 你嘅性格會因應情況而改變。
translations.ru: Твой характер меняется в зависимости от ситуации.
translations.pt: A sua personalidade muda conforme a situação.
translations.vi: Tính cách của bạn thay đổi tùy theo tình huống.
translations.nl: Je persoonlijkheid verandert afhankelijk van de situatie.
translations.uk: Твій характер змінюється залежно від ситуації.
translations.hu: A személyiséged a helyzettől függően változik.
translations.hi: तुम्हारी शख्सियत स्थिति के अनुसार बदलती है.
translations.pl: Twoja osobowość zmienia się w zależności od sytuacji.
translations.el: Η προσωπικότητά σου αλλάζει ανάλογα με την κατάσταση.
translations.nb: Personligheten din endrer seg etter situasjonen.
translations.sv: Din personlighet förändras beroende på situationen.
translations.ro: Personalitatea ta se schimbă în funcție de situație.
translations.cs: Tvoje osobnost se mění podle situace.
translations.da: Din personlighed ændrer sig alt efter situationen.
translations.ja: あなたの性格は状況に応じて変わります。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (2nd person singular), feminine singular, modifying “personnalité”.
Common noun (feminine singular); subject of the verb “change”.
Main verb, present tense 3rd person singular.
Preposition introducing a criterion or reference (“les situations”).
Definite article, plural, determiner of “situations”.
Common noun, plural; object of the preposition “selon”.
